extract: Darmanitan (Japanese: ヒヒダルマ Hihidaruma) is a Fire-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Darumaka starting at level 35. In Galar, Darmanitan has an Ice-type regional form: Galarian Darmanitan. It evolves from Galarian Darumaka when exposed to an Ice Stone. If Darmanitan's Ability is Zen Mode and its HP drops to half or below, it changes from its Standard Mode into its Zen Mode. Unovan Zen Mode Darmanitan is dual-type Fire/Psychic, while Galarian Zen Mode Darmanitan is dual-type Ice/Fire.
